backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines MenuItem and MenuCategory types, holds a static menu with Appetizers, Pizzas, and Pastas categories, and exposes a query method getMenuCategories(). Also includes blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (multi-page React frontend, navbar, home page sections, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of every frontend module.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color tokens, plus base border and background styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, Google Fonts imports for Cormorant Garamond and Lato, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (Home, About, Menu, Gallery, Contact) and a shared root layout containing Navbar, Footer, and FloatingWhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed bottom-right floating button linking to WhatsApp with a pulse animation, hover tooltip, and smooth scale transition.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with restaurant branding, quick navigation links, address/phone/Instagram contact info, and WhatsApp/Instagram social icon buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with restaurant logo/brand text, desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, scroll shadow effect, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
A React form component for table reservations that validates user input (name, phone, date, time, guests) and redirects to a pre-filled WhatsApp message upon successful submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useGetMenuCategories hook that fetches menu categories from the ICP backend actor using React Query with a 10-minute stale time.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines a warm brand color palette using OKLCH CSS variables, and declares utility classes and keyframe animations (fade-in, card hover, success bounce, etc.).
frontend/src/lib/useFadeIn.ts: A custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to add a 'visible' CSS class to a referenced element when it scrolls into view, enabling fade-in-up animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: The About page displaying the restaurant's story, philosophy, and values using fade-in animated sections with images and icon cards.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: The Contact page showing the restaurant's address, opening hours, and contact buttons (phone, WhatsApp, Instagram) alongside an embedded map, with fade-in animated sections.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page displaying 12 restaurant/food images in a masonry-style 3-column grid with a lightbox viewer supporting keyboard navigation (arrow keys, escape) and fade-in animations.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page with hero banner, signature dishes section, feature highlights, customer testimonials, Instagram grid, and an embedded reservation form with smooth scroll and fade-in animations.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: Menu page rendering the full restaurant menu (multiple categories with prices and veg/non-veg flags) with search, category filtering, and a skeleton loading state via a useGetMenuCategories hook.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining brand color tokens (cream, brown, terracotta, olive), custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Lato), extended shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking version, architectural notes (palette, fonts, WhatsApp/Instagram details, menu data), known issues, image requirements, and a list of already-implemented features for the restaurant website.
